releases.summary: Idle effects no longer disturb the terminal layout or scrollback.

changes.text: Limited animated snowfall to the visible terminal viewport so redraws preserve conversation scrollback.
Reserved a stable slot for idle tips so appearing and disappearing tips no longer shift the input layout.
Made first-time npx setup wait for Enter, highlight its completion guidance, and clear installation logs before opening Furnace.

releases.summary: Furnace now installs persistently from one npx command across platforms.

changes.text: Added one-time setup through `npx cook-furnace@latest`, followed by the persistent `furnace` command.
Added a branded first-run installer with progress, PATH restart guidance, and tips configuration help.
Moved `furnace update` to versioned user-owned installations that avoid global npm permissions and Windows file locks.
Configured User PATH automatically when needed on Windows, macOS, and Linux without administrator access.
Kept credentials, settings, conversations, images, and project state separate from replaceable application versions.
Added `/tips` as an alias for toggling idle tips.

releases.summary: Missing API key guidance is now persistent and actionable.

changes.text: Show a persistent `/login` warning on startup and after switching conversations when no API key is configured.
Repeat the highlighted API key warning whenever a message is attempted without configured credentials.

releases.summary: Lofi mode has its compact dancing terminal chibi again.

changes.text: Restored the small right-aligned ASCII dancer when `/lofi` is enabled.
Kept the animation to one row with a still pose when reduced-motion mode is active.

releases.summary: Subagent status and background-task guidance are clearer and more accurate.

changes.text: Added live `Ctrl+K` toggling for subagent task details.
Instructed the agent to keep answering normally after backgrounding subagents because Furnace automatically returns completion results.
Explicitly prohibited polling background subagents unless the user asks for it.
Stopped completed failures and cancellations from appearing as active tasks in `task_status`.
Added coverage confirming parent agents receive delegation tools while child agents cannot recursively delegate.

releases.summary: Queued follow-ups now stay ordered, editable, and isolated across concurrent chats.

changes.text: Added queue editing with previous/next navigation, in-place saving, deletion, cancellation, image preservation, and send-now controls.
Allowed `/new`, `/resume`, and `/history` while an agent is working so conversations can continue safely in the background.
Kept queues scoped to their conversations across pinned-chat switching and restored their runtime state when revisited.
User interruption now pauses queued follow-ups until an explicit queued or new message resumes FIFO processing.
Added compact themed queue hints and Windows-safe Shift+F5–F8 shortcut fallbacks alongside the existing Alt shortcuts.
Preserved queued image attachments and stable visual ordering while selecting, editing, cancelling, or sending follow-ups.

releases.summary: Animated snowfall can now drift across every Furnace layout.

changes.text: Added `/snow` to toggle snowfall over the current layout, with `/snow low`, `/snow medium`, and `/snow hard` intensity controls.
Snowflakes animate only through open space so interface text and controls remain readable, with a still reduced-motion fallback.
Made low-intensity snowfall gentler and added `/snow` to rotating idle tips.

releases.summary: Image-heavy conversations now work reliably across providers and report accurate context usage.

changes.text: Prevented text-only DeepSeek models from failing when conversation history contains image attachments.
Added an automatic text-only retry for OpenAI-compatible providers when a selected model rejects image input.
Stopped base64 image size from inflating context usage and aligned compaction boundaries with the same provider-neutral image token budget.
Added `/model` guidance for editing settings with Tab and selecting a model with Enter.

releases.summary: Conversation selection and thinking status are clearer.

changes.text: Pressing Enter in `/resume` now opens the selected conversation; only Tab pins or unpins it.
Highlighted the thinking status text in the same accent color as its animated indicator.

releases.summary: Todo tool activity is readable as a checklist again.

changes.text: Restored dedicated `todowrite` and `todoread` rendering instead of showing raw input and output JSON.
Todo activity now shows active and completed counts with distinct symbols and styling for every status.

releases.summary: Idle moments now surface useful Furnace shortcuts without interrupting work.

changes.text: Added rotating idle tips for useful commands, settings, and shortcuts, including conversation pinning with Tab in `/resume`.
Added `/tip` and an Idle tips setting; tips default on and stay hidden during streaming, work, Plan mode, questions, and popups.
Tips appear every ten seconds, remain visible for five seconds, and highlight their label and slash commands.

releases.summary: The status footer now uses purposeful color instead of dimming everything.

changes.text: Colored the app name, working path, Git branch, model, mode, cost, context, and other footer values by meaning.
Kept labels and separators subdued while making important status values easier to scan.

releases.summary: Evolve migration prompts now include a permanent opt-out.

changes.text: Added Don’t ask again to disable future automatic Evolve migration attempts while preserving existing Evolve data.
Marked STFU and Caveman response-format requirements as critical and mandatory.

releases.summary: The latest release notes can now be reopened on demand.

changes.text: Added `/change` to force-open What’s New for the latest bundled Furnace version.
`furnace update` now explains Evolve reapplication and links to both `/change` and the website changelog.
Strengthened STFU and Caveman guidance so smaller models consistently apply the selected style to every user-facing response.

releases.summary: Model selection now stays focused on the active provider.

changes.text: `/model`, its autocomplete, and direct model arguments now list only models from the active provider.
`/models` remains available for explicitly browsing models across configured providers.

releases.summary: Saved provider credentials can now be activated directly.

changes.text: Added a Use provider action for configured API keys in `/login`.
Using an existing key now persists the provider, selects its default model, and refreshes available models.

releases.summary: Update notifications no longer remain on screen indefinitely.

changes.text: The new-version banner now dismisses itself after eight seconds.

releases.summary: What’s New now remains open until you explicitly dismiss it.

changes.text: The What’s New screen now closes only when Escape is pressed; Enter is ignored.
Release notes are shown only when the running version matches the newest manifest release.

releases.summary: The What’s New screen no longer consumes the key used to launch Furnace.

changes.text: Fixed the startup Enter key immediately activating Continue and dismissing What’s New.
What’s New now mounts after the terminal screen and input handler are initialized.

releases.summary: The What’s New screen now remains visible during startup.

changes.text: Fixed session initialization immediately replacing the What’s New screen with the normal prompt.
Unblocked the Evolve migration prompt that waits until What’s New is continued.

releases.summary: Release startup now reliably explains and reapplies an update.

changes.text: Fixed the missing What’s New popup after updating from 0.2.3 to 0.2.5.
Selecting Reapply previous evolve changes now starts `/evolve-merge` immediately instead of only drafting the command.
What’s New remains the first startup step, before any Evolve migration begins.

releases.summary: Release notes are now visible wherever you use Furnace.

changes.text: Added a first-launch What’s New panel for each installed version.
Added a complete, Git-derived changelog to the Furnace website.
Release notes now come from one structured manifest instead of the legacy changelog file.

releases.summary: Furnace can now update itself.

changes.text: Added `furnace update` and `furnace --update` for npm-global installations.
Added updater completions and safe guidance for source checkouts.
Made Agent and Plan modes easier to distinguish in the footer.

releases.summary: Conversation search is fuzzy again.

changes.text: Restored fuzzy conversation search in `/resume` and `/history`.
Search now covers titles, messages, tool activity, and compaction summaries.
Preserved pin and unpin behavior in both history command aliases.

releases.summary: Evolve migration prompts respect a user’s decision.

changes.text: Choosing Later now dismisses an Evolve migration for the current Furnace version.
Prevented denied migrations from prompting repeatedly at startup.

releases.summary: A version milestone carrying the 0.1.23 feature set.

changes.text: Promoted the usage, pinned-chat, response-mode, and multitasking release line to 0.2.

releases.summary: Usage visibility and multitasking arrived together.

changes.text: Added `/usage` with twelve-month token history, accepted agent lines, and recorded cost.
Added up to five pinned chats with `/pin`, `/pins`, Ctrl+P, and Ctrl+G.
Added `/stfu` minimal-response mode and `/caveman` prose mode.
Condensed repeated tool activity while STFU mode is active.
Fixed globally installed CLI executability and improved interrupt/tool details.

releases.summary: Evolve migrations became recoverable and cumulative.

changes.text: Hardened migration failure and retry state.
Preserved cumulative tracked and untracked customizations.
Recreated missing migration checkouts and improved `/evolve-merge` recovery guidance.

releases.summary: Evolve restarts no longer hang on active input.

changes.text: Moved restart handoff to the next event-loop turn and cleanly terminated the old process.

releases.summary: Replacement processes restart safely.

changes.text: Spawned and detached replacement Furnace processes instead of synchronously waiting for them.

releases.summary: Evolve keeps editor interaction under control.

changes.text: Kept input locked through preparation, editing, verification, approval, and restart/error prompts.
Documented preservation of tracked and untracked customizations.

releases.summary: Migration language now explains what Evolve is doing.

changes.text: Clarified Evolve migration UI as reapplying previous changes.

releases.summary: Evolved customizations survive upgrades.

changes.text: Added safe migration of Evolve customizations across Furnace upgrades.
Added `/evolve-merge` for agent-assisted conflict resolution.
Preserved old customizations and ran stock Furnace if automatic migration failed.

releases.summary: Restart now actually launches the replacement.

changes.text: Fixed Evolve restart execution during shutdown.

releases.summary: Approved Evolve changes end with an explicit restart choice.

changes.text: Added Restart now and Restart later actions after an approved Evolve change.
Kept the recovery command visible in the restart prompt.

releases.summary: Published installs can recover source without a matching tag.

changes.text: Fell back to npm’s recorded Git commit when an Evolve release tag was unavailable.

releases.summary: Evolve now works from published npm installations.

changes.text: Downloaded version-matched source and build dependencies for npm-installed Furnace.
Activated approved evolved bundles on the next launch.
Improved source-checkout detection and portable verification.

releases.summary: A new Asteroid layout joined a cleaner public package.

changes.text: Added the Asteroid terminal layout and matching space theme.
Added an early-access feedback link.
Backspace on collapsed pasted text now offers edit, delete, or cancel.

releases.summary: Repository initialization became worktree-aware.

changes.text: Made `/init` index the current Git worktree.
Remembered index-onboarding choices and optionally reindexed after upstream changes.
Added dedicated rendering for agent questions.

releases.summary: Furnace gained distinct terminal layouts and more durable UI state.

changes.text: Added Classic, Notebook, and Console terminal layouts.
Added bordered input, styled slash menus, and clipboard image paste.
Made upgrade and onboarding notices persist until acted upon.
Fixed status settings, session isolation, credentials, recovery, compression, and terminal interactions.
Restored the Node.js version ceiling below Node 23.

releases.summary: Node.js 23 became temporarily supported.

changes.text: Expanded the engine range from Node 22-only to Node 22.19 and newer.

releases.summary: A new rendering engine and self-modification workflow reshaped Furnace.

changes.text: Replaced the Ink interface with the differential-rendered Pi TUI.
Added Pi-style editing, autocomplete, model settings, permission dialogs, and tool activity.
Added `/evolve`, `/reset`, and `--recover` with verification, approval, rollback, and recovery points.
Removed the old sidebar and Vim/input-mode surfaces.
Fixed duplicate status lines, transcript spacing, message rendering, and model controls.

releases.summary: Model output limits became configurable.

changes.text: Added maximum output-token controls to `/model` and `FURNACE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS`.
Defaulted model turns to an 8,192-token output cap.

releases.summary: Repository indexes became smaller and more useful.

changes.text: Reworked indexes into a compact path-oriented structure with metadata.
Improved discovery, filtering, fallback generation, and index guidance.

releases.summary: Furnace learned to index a repository before working in it.

changes.text: Added `/init` and local `.furnace/repo-index.md` generation.
Added interactive repository-index onboarding.

releases.summary: Headless runs gained provider controls and cleaner measurement.

changes.text: Added provider, model, permission-mode, and title-generation CLI overrides.
Improved JSON output cleanliness and model context-window accuracy.
Added request timing and prompt-cache usage reporting.

releases.summary: Usage accounting became persistent and context became leaner.

changes.text: Added persisted token, cache, and estimated-cost accounting.
Replaced quiet historical full-file reads with retrievable previews.
Removed the beta split-chat mode.
Documented npm install and update commands.

releases.summary: A package-only maintenance release.

changes.text: Updated package and lockfile versions without runtime changes.

releases.summary: Local Furnace state stopped cluttering Git status.

changes.text: Added `.furnace/` to the worktree-local Git exclusion file.
Displayed the installed version on the welcome screen.

releases.summary: The first public Furnace release.

changes.text: Shipped the streamed coding agent with file, shell, web, and permission tools.
Added local sessions, resume and fork, plans, skills, subagents, compaction, and images.
Added provider login, BYOK, OpenAI-compatible, OpenRouter, Anthropic, and custom providers.
Added themes, terminal workflows, npm-global installation, and Node.js guardrails.
